mapper.insert: INSERT INTO recommendation ( user_id, input_mode, input_text, product_option, tpo_type, style_type, is_saved, ai_blueprint, ai_explanation ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{inputMode}, #{inputText}, #{productOption}, #{tpoType}, #{styleType}, #{isSaved}, CAST(#{aiBlueprint} AS JSON), #{aiExplanation} )

INSERT INTO recommendation_item ( rec_id, slot_key, source_type, product_id, search_query, priority, match_score, reason ) VALUES ( #{recId}, #{slotKey}, #{sourceType}, #{productId}, #{searchQuery}, #{priority}, #{matchScore}, #{reason} )

INSERT INTO product ( source, external_id, category_id, gender, name, brand, price, image_url, link, color, material, fit, style, season, temp_min, temp_max ) VALUES ( #{source}, #{externalId}, #{categoryId}, #{gender}, #{name}, #{brand}, #{price}, #{imageUrl}, #{link}, #{color}, #{material}, #{fit}, #{style}, #{season}, #{tempMin}, #{tempMax} ) ON DUPLICATE KEY UPDATE gender = VALUES(gender), name = VALUES(name), brand = VALUES(brand), price = VALUES(price), image_url = VALUES(image_url), link = VALUES(link), color = VALUES(color), material = VALUES(material), fit = VALUES(fit), style = VALUES(style), season = VALUES(season), temp_min = VALUES(temp_min), temp_max = VALUES(temp_max), fetched_at = CURRENT_TIMESTAMP

INSERT INTO product_image_metadata ( product_id, user_id, mime_type, image_size_bytes, storage_provider, storage_url, storage_path, checksum_sha256 ) VALUES ( #{productId}, #{userId}, #{mimeType}, #{imageSizeBytes}, #{storageProvider}, #{storageUrl}, #{storagePath}, #{checksumSha256} )
INSERT INTO closet_item ( user_id, product_id, is_active ) VALUES ( #{userId}, #{productId}, TRUE )
mapper.select: SELECT category_id FROM category WHERE code = #{code} LIMIT 1

SELECT product_id AS productId, source, external_id AS externalId, category_id AS categoryId, gender, name, brand, price, image_url AS imageUrl, link, color, material, fit, style, season, temp_min AS tempMin, temp_max AS tempMax FROM product WHERE source = #{source} AND external_id = #{externalId} LIMIT 1

SELECT product_id AS productId, source, external_id AS externalId, category_id AS categoryId, gender, name, brand, price, image_url AS imageUrl, link, color, material, fit, style, season, temp_min AS tempMin, temp_max AS tempMax FROM product WHERE source = #{source} AND external_id IN
#{externalId}
